name: Antinuclear Antibody
facility: Patterson Park Urgent Care (send-out to LabCorp)
interpretation: Low-positive ANA at 1:80 with homogeneous pattern. Clinical significance must be interpreted in context — low titers can occur in up to ~10-15% of healthy individuals. Confirmatory specific autoantibodies (dsDNA, anti-Smith, anti-Ro/La) and complement levels recommended in the appropriate clinical setting.
